title: Fix chat messages visibility in conversation history

requirements.text: Fix the ConversationHistory component so that both user-sent messages and Ana's responses are visibly rendered on screen. Ensure message text, bubble backgrounds, and text colors have sufficient contrast against the page background so messages are readable in both light and dark themes. Verify that right-aligned sent bubbles (warm-coral style) and left-aligned Ana response cards (frosted-glass style) defined in index.css are correctly applied and not hidden by transparent backgrounds, zero opacity, or conflicting CSS rules.

quotes: chat messages are not visible to the user

acceptanceCriteria: User-sent messages appear as right-aligned bubbles with clearly visible text and background color
Ana's response messages appear as left-aligned cards with clearly visible text and background
Messages are readable in both light and dark theme modes
No messages are hidden, transparent, or zero-opacity
Existing right-alignment behavior from version 36 is preserved

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or Motoko logic
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve right-aligned sent message bubbles implemented in version 36
nonGoals: Adding new chat features or message types
Changing the overall app layout or color theme
Modifying backend check-in or response logic
